message:
test: Add unit tests for Discord API client

Adds 12 unit tests for DiscordApiClient using wiremock:
- get_current_user (success and unauthorized)
- create_message (with content and embeds)
- get_channel, get_guild, get_gateway
- delete_message
- Rate limiting (429 response)
- Bot token normalization
- Error retryability and retry_after handling

Also improves gateway event forwarding to properly break
when the event receiver is dropped.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
